creator: florian@wagner-flo.de
text:
Hey Rainer,

I've also built the port in Poudriere and it worked against Python 3.9. Seem's like the import_metadata stuff is included in Python 3.8 and up [1], so that might we why I didn't catch that. I'll see about this tomorrow...

[1] https://pypi.org/project/importlib-metadata/
